en: There´s one person I forgot to tell. Do you mind if I make a FaceTime real quick?
ko: 내가 말하는 걸 잊은 사람이 한 명 있어.

en: Just real quick, I promise you. You´re gonna FaceTime somebody? Yeah, I just forgot to tell one person, man.
Who are you gonna FaceTime? Oh, you know, just a close friend of mine.
Somebody I´m very close to. You may know him.
Dwayne the Rock Johnson. I´m gonna FaceTime him.
I know him. We love Dwayne Johnson.
ko: 알아. 그를 알아. 우리는 드웨인 존슨을 사랑해.

en: Listen, he´s not gonna be able to believe that I´m here. Watch this. Watch.
ko: 들어봐, 그가 내가 여기 있다는 걸 믿지 못할 거야. 봐봐. 봐.

en: He´s gonna be so pumped up that I´m here tonight, man. Wait until he picks up.
ko: 그가 오늘 밤 내가 여기 있다는 걸 듣고 엄청 신날 거야.

en: I know he´s gonna be pumped up about it. Hold on. Wait a second. Hold on.
ko: 그가 이걸 듣고 신날 거라는 걸 알아.

en: One second. Let me try him. Let me just try him. Maybe he´s driving or something.
ko: 한 순간만. 그에게 시도해볼게. 그냥 시도해볼게.

en: No, he´s not driving. He´s got a chauffeur. That guy´s, he´s got a lot of people to drive for him.
ko: 아니, 그는 운전 중이 아니야. 그는 운전사를 두고 있어.

en: He´s just, he probably didn´t see it. Give him two minutes. He´ll pick up. Watch. He´s gonna pick up.
Watch this. I´m gonna try him again. Watch this. Watch this.
He´s gonna go crazy. Watch this.
As soon as he picks up, in like two seconds, he´s gonna go, he´s gonna go crazy.
The fact that I´m here, that you´re here. You can edit all this out.
ko: 내가 여기 있다는 사실, 네가 여기 있다는 사실.

en: You can edit all this out. You don´t have to edit it out. Just give me a second.
